# Q-ID® Optical
## 100% Unbreakable Quantum Product and Brand Authentication System
  * Impossible to copy, clone or fake
  * Standard smartphone authentication
  * Empower consumer led authentication
  * We can provide an immediate Q-ID® solution at box and foil level
  * Integrated simply into existing manufacturing process


### Request Further Information on our Q-ID® Solution 
## Q-ID® – Quantum Fingerprint Technology
Quantum Base is a scientific business which harnesses the random effects of quantum materials to create unbreakable quantum unique identities – Q-ID®s – for the identification and authentication of physical products.
Each Q-ID® contains billions of randomly arranged atoms in the quantum materials we use, forming a unique quantum fingerprint. Through seamless integration into existing secure print processes, we deliver billions of Q-ID®, simply and flexibly, meeting the [global security needs](https://quantumbase.com/supply-chain-security/) of our [brand](https://quantumbase.com/brand-protection/) and government customers.
Q-ID® combines cutting-edge materials science with advanced mathematics and algorithmic design to deliver simple, scalable, consumer-led authentication—accessible to global communities of consumers at the touch of a button using any standard smartphone.
### **Q-ID® Optical Solution:**
  * 100% secure quantum anti-counterfeit tags
  * Globally scalable authentication
  * Read with standard smartphone and app
  * Maximum design simplicity, impossible to copy
  * Have unique identities to create new functionality opportunity for increased levels of consumer trust in online and physical channels
  * Provide next generation customer insights in real time, creating a new platform for customer/brand interaction across global markets


[![Q-ID demonstration screenshot](https://quantumbase.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/12/demo-screenshot-1000.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=br-f15t-qtQ)

## Unique Identities
Our solution lies in the atomic world, where the laws of quantum mechanics exist. These can be harnessed to produce security tags that are simple to make, yet impossible to copy.
At the core of each is a unique quantum ID derived from the atomic structure, which is then simply and uniquely read by customers using a standard smartphone to allow absolute secure authentication for billions across global supply chains to end consumer.
![Digital_Fingerprint](https://quantumbase.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/11/web-AdobeStock_156725149-495x400.jpg)
## The Track-and-Trace Capability
Our Q-ID® Optical solution can be turned ‘on’ or ‘off’ in the supply chain in real-time, in conjunction with a database, and so allows an opportunity for significant competitive advantage through intelligent tracking and cost reductions in supply chain logistics and supply chain management.
![Data Connectivity](https://quantumbase.com/wp-content/uploads/2015/02/web-AdobeStock_78071686-495x400.jpg)
![Digital_Protection](https://quantumbase.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/11/web-AdobeStock_144109952-495x400.jpg)
## Real Time Global Data
Via smartphone authentication, Q-ID® Optical tags provide detailed customer data in real-time.
This global data combined with AI technologies are driving unique market insights, reducing marketing spend, and creating competitive organisational advantage across diverse global markets.
![Woman Phone Hand](https://quantumbase.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/11/web-phone_woman_hand-495x400.jpg)
## Connecting Products and Consumers 
Q-ID®s are empowering consumer trust in brands across both physical and online channels, while creating the opportunity for new online platforms to connect you and your customers to connect, interact and share globally in real-time.
With the power of our Q-ID® technology, you can help protect your business’ online presence and give your customers unmatched confidence in their purchases.
## Project Planning
We are here to help you get the best from our technology and will provide you with as much or as little support as you need.
Like most new implementations we expect to provide you with a timely response to get you up and running. But the support doesn’t stop there!
We aim to keep that high level of support throughout the term of your business relationship with us.

![Lancaster University](https://quantumbase.com/wp-content/uploads/2017/11/web-InfoLab21-495x400.jpg)

If you would like to find out more about how we can help secure your brand and products, and drive customer insights, please get in touch: info@quantumbase.com

<div class="hr av-2urhv98-49cf2e5d9f26bac21f9cfd46e6190258 hr-custom  avia-builder-el-7  el_after_av_heading  el_before_av_one_half  hr-left hr-icon-no "><span class="hr-inner inner-border-av-border-fat"><span class="hr-inner-style"></span></span></div>
<div class="flex_column av-2u1zvf0-6c6b965a7ad9aca75694d0e67a3db732 av_one_half  avia-builder-el-8  el_after_av_hr  el_before_av_one_half  first flex_column_div av-zero-column-padding "><section class="av_textblock_section " itemscope="itemscope" itemtype="https://schema.org/CreativeWork"><div class="avia_textblock  " itemprop="text"><p>Quantum Base is a scientific business which harnesses the random effects of quantum materials to create unbreakable quantum unique identities – Q-ID®s – for the identification and authentication of physical products.</p>
<p>Each Q-ID® contains billions of randomly arranged atoms in the quantum materials we use, forming a unique quantum fingerprint. Through seamless integration into existing secure print processes, we deliver billions of Q-ID®, simply and flexibly, meeting the <a href="https://quantumbase.com/supply-chain-security/">global security needs</a> of our <a href="https://quantumbase.com/brand-protection/">brand</a> and government customers.</p>
<p>Q-ID® combines cutting-edge materials science with advanced mathematics and algorithmic design to deliver simple, scalable, consumer-led authentication—accessible to global communities of consumers at the touch of a button using any standard smartphone.</p>
</div></section>
<div class="hr av-m5gssz9n-e32ab54ed77dd4ba745154f498a8fe17 hr-custom  avia-builder-el-10  el_after_av_textblock  el_before_av_textblock  hr-center hr-icon-no "><span class="hr-inner inner-border-av-border-none"><span class="hr-inner-style"></span></span></div>

<ul>
<li>100% secure quantum anti-counterfeit tags</li>
<li>Globally scalable authentication</li>
<li>Read with standard smartphone and app</li>
<li>Maximum design simplicity, impossible to copy</li>
<li>Have unique identities to create new functionality opportunity for increased levels of consumer trust in online and physical channels</li>
<li>Provide next generation customer insights in real time, creating a new platform for customer/brand interaction across global markets</li>
</ul>

<section class="av_tab_section"><div aria-controls="tab-id-1-content" role="tab" tabindex="0" data-fake-id="#tab-id-1" class="tab active_tab fullsize-tab" aria-hidden="false">How we use cookies</div>
<div id="tab-id-1-content" class="tab_content active_tab_content" aria-hidden="false" style="min-height: 1px;">
<div class="tab_inner_content invers-color">
<p>We may request cookies to be set on your device. We use cookies to let us know when you visit our websites, how you interact with us, to enrich your user experience, and to customize your relationship with our website. </p>
<p>Click on the different category headings to find out more. You can also change some of your preferences. Note that blocking some types of cookies may impact your experience on our websites and the services we are able to offer.</p>

<div class="tab_inner_content invers-color">
<p>These cookies are strictly necessary to provide you with services available through our website and to use some of its features.</p>
<p>Because these cookies are strictly necessary to deliver the website, refuseing them will have impact how our site functions. You always can block or delete cookies by changing your browser settings and force blocking all cookies on this website. But this will always prompt you to accept/refuse cookies when revisiting our site.</p>
<p>We fully respect if you want to refuse cookies but to avoid asking you again and again kindly allow us to store a cookie for that. You are free to opt out any time or opt in for other cookies to get a better experience. If you refuse cookies we will remove all set cookies in our domain.</p>
<p>We provide you with a list of stored cookies on your computer in our domain so you can check what we stored. Due to security reasons we are not able to show or modify cookies from other domains. You can check these in your browser security settings.</p>
